package rulecoverage

func PositiveFullDatasetLoad() string {
    ruleID := "full_dataset_load"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Calls that load an entire payload into memory instead of streaming."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
